responseMessageContents.description: The system for finding and engaging global investors is now live and fully tested. It automatically identifies what potential investors are looking for, creates web pages tailored to their interests, and uses AI to answer their questions. We have confirmed that the entire process works, from the first search to the final dashboard update, ensuring all data is correctly saved and tracked.
